mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean in >65% of periods when FEDFUNDS increases, or rolling Rank IC < 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an imminent labor market contraction that reduces consumer spending and corporate profits, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >70% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction with accuracy >55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized domestic demand growth that boosts corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >60% of occurrences, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving supply-side capacity utilization that reduces input cost pressures and supports near-term equity price appreciation over the following week.
failure_condition: The signal predicts positive returns in fewer than 50% of cases during easing periods, or the 5-day forward return correlation with INDPRO growth falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly inflation readings above the 0.3 percent threshold force central banks to maintain restrictive policy stances, increasing borrowing costs and suppressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of triggered months, or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for Fed funds rate changes.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rates confirms a robust labor market expansion that sustains wage growth and consumer demand, generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a baseline momentum strategy by >2% annually, or the interaction coefficient is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample forecasts.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product directly translates to higher aggregate corporate earnings, creating a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 prices over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC remains below 0.03, or forward returns show no significant correlation with GDP growth rates across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply chain bottlenecks and weakening manufacturing activity that triggers risk-off sentiment and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: The signal produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances, or the predictive accuracy drops below 52% in walk-forward validation.
